title: haplopappus kingii
intro: Haplopappus kingii, also known as King's Rayless Goldenrod, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infection. The plant's medicinal properties make it beneficial for a range of health issues, including wound healing, sore throats, and respiratory problems. Haplopappus kingii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, making it a versatile remedy for various ailments.
